title: FUGUEの実装を確認し、Kernelとの差分を埋めて。ただしFUGUE/kernel両方の既存のシステムを損壊しないように慎重に実装をマルチエージェントで進めて。
summary_text: - **Low**: Stale `context_reference` can remain in compact and be surfaced in Kernel prompt even when the referenced file no longer exists. Preservation logic intentionally keeps prior reference when `KERNEL_CONTEXT_REFERENCE_PATH` points to a missing file, and prompt rendering does not re-check path existence, so operators may get a dead path in resume prompts.
